expectations.evidence: report.html exists with 255 lines of valid HTML containing a complete quality review report.
report.csv exists with 23 lines (header + 22 data rows) in proper CSV format.

expectations.text: Report contains accessibility section (Section A / 접근성)
expectations.evidence: No 'Section A' or '접근성' heading exists. Accessibility issues appear as a category tag within file-based sections, not as a dedicated structured section.

expectations.text: Report contains SEO & Web Performance section (Section B)
expectations.evidence: No 'Section B' heading exists. SEO and Performance appear as category tags within file-based sections, not as a dedicated structured section.

expectations.text: All 33 KWCAG2.2 items are evaluated (none skipped)
expectations.evidence: No KWCAG2.2 checklist items are referenced. The report lists only 22 ad-hoc issues across Accessibility, SEO, Performance, Security, and Code Quality categories. No systematic evaluation of all 33 KWCAG items.

expectations.text: All SEO items (SEO-01 through SEO-11) are evaluated
expectations.evidence: No SEO-01 through SEO-11 identifiers appear anywhere in the report. Only 2 SEO-related issues are listed without standardized item IDs.

expectations.text: All WP items (WP-01 through WP-18) are evaluated
expectations.evidence: No WP-01 through WP-18 identifiers appear anywhere in the report. Performance issues are listed without standardized item IDs.

expectations.text: Failed items include specific issue descriptions with file/line references
expectations.evidence: All 22 issues include file path (e.g., 'pages/index.html'), line numbers (e.g., '37-44'), specific issue descriptions, and recommendations with code examples.

expectations.text: Fix guide section exists with concrete code-level recommendations
expectations.evidence: No dedicated 'Fix guide' section exists. Each issue row has a 'Recommendation' column with code-level suggestions, but these are inline per-issue rather than a separate consolidated fix guide section.
The entire report is written in English. The HTML lang attribute is 'en', the title is 'Web Quality Review Report', and all issue descriptions and recommendations are in English.
